channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Apple Watch faces a wearables wake-up call
item.description: Apple Watch sales are enduring a years-long backslide. While Apple first launched its watch in 2015, sales didn’t spike until the pandemic, when consumers were highly focused on their health.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Fired FTC commissioners sue Trump
item.description: Two Federal Trade Commission (FTC) members fired by President Trump sued him Thursday, setting up another major test of his administration’s expansionist view of presidential authority over independent agencies.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Everything new on Netflix in April 2025 – including Black Mirror season 7 and Love on the Spectrum
item.description: Excited for Black Mirror season 7? It's just one of the many new movies and shows arriving on Netflix in April 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Figure Skating's Vision 2030: A New Era for the Sport?
item.description: The International Skating Union's ambitious plan to grow and expand the sport through improved fan engagement, simplified rules, and new technology is underway at the world championships in Boston.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Want Apple's Lumon Terminal Pro computer? It's sadly not for sale, but these Severance keyboard caps are a close second
item.description: Apple has revealed a Severance-style Lumon Terminal Pro computer that sadly isn't for sale, but you can get these replica keycaps from Signature Plastics instead.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: 9 CRM trends for 2025: AI reshapes the customer equation
item.description: AI has the potential to transform every aspect of an enterprise, but nowhere more so than in customer relationship management (CRM), the outward-facing business functions of sales, marketing, and customer service.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Preserving Loved Ones' Voices: A Heartfelt Way to Keep Memories Alive
item.description: Discover the comfort and solace of preserving loved ones' voices with practical steps and recommendations for saving voicemails and recording them for safekeeping.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: X's Advertising Revenue Sees Growth Amid Musk's Influence
item.description: Elon Musk's X, formerly Twitter, is projected to generate $1.31 billion in US advertising sales in 2025, an increase of 17.5%, according to Emarketer.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: GameStop adopts policy to buy Bitcoin, joining other firms
item.description: GameStop Corp., the struggling video-game retailer that became a favorite of retail traders during the meme stock frenzy in 2021, said its board has approved a plan to add Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Microsoft’s newest AI agents can detail how they reason
item.description: If you’re wondering how AI agents work, Microsoft’s new Copilot AI agents provide real-time answers on how data is being analyzed and sourced to reach results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Conservatives embrace Tesla as liberals ditch Elon Musk
item.description: Conservatives are rallying around Tesla while liberals ditch or distance themselves from Elon Musk’s electric vehicles (EVs) in a surprising about-face for a company whose fate is deeply tied to the politics of sustainability and climate issues.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: How agencies can improve zero trust architecture by addressing their data problem
item.description: Carmelo McCutcheon, the public sector CTO for VAST Data Federal, offers six ways agencies can improve their data protection. The post How agencies can improve zero trust architecture by addressing their data problem first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Warning for developers, web admins: update Next.js to prevent exploit
item.description: Developers and web admins using the Next.js framework for building or managing interactive web applications should install a security update to plug a critical vulnerability.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In 2025, you can’t have an effective democracy without data literacy
item.description: Data literacy should be a part of the 21st-century civics curriculum. The post In 2025, you can’t have an effective democracy without data literacy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Review: The new M4 MacBook Air is even better for business
item.description: Beneath the hyperbole around Apple Intelligence and intensifying regulation, you might have missed that Apple recently introduced a new MacBook Air equipped with an M4 chip. It’s a compelling upgrade to the world’s best-selling laptop, and I’ve had time to put it through its paces.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia wants to be a one-stop enterprise technology shop
item.description: After last week’s Nvidia GTC 2025 event, a new, fuller picture of the vendor is emerging. Analysts agree that Nvidia is not just a graphics chip provider anymore. It’s a full-stack solution provider, and GPUs are just one of many parts.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: America's smallest EV truck prototype has arrived
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses how this super-small electric mini-truck takes a big step toward production.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Learning AI governance lessons from SaaS and Web2
item.description: The experimental phase of generative AI is over. Enterprises now face mounting pressure — from boardrooms to the front lines — to move AI into production to streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and drive innovation.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Prompt engineering courses and certifications tech companies want
item.description: Prompt engineering is the process of structuring or creating an instruction to produce the best possible output from a generative AI model. Industries such as healthcare, banking, financial services, insurance, and retail all have use cases for prompt engineering, says the report.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: GSA’s overhaul of FedRAMP contingent on automation
item.description: The General Services Administration will release details of FedRAMP 2025 today outlining a much different program focused mostly on standards and policies. The post GSA’s overhaul of FedRAMP contingent on automation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Kotlin bolsters K2 compiler plugin support, WebAssembly debugging
item.description: Kotlin 2.1.20, just released as the latest version of JetBrains’ cross-platform programming language, improves both plugin support for the K2 compiler and Kotlin/Wasm debugging. The Kotlin update was announced March 20. Instructions on updating can be found at kotlinlang.org.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys
item.description: President Donald Trump is expected to sign two executive orders in the coming weeks that seek to reform federal acquisition, including a rewrite of the FAR. The post Draft EO would make GSA the center of most common buys first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
